root.sql: select sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname as member_name , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract.ending_of_contract , (select month_name_thai from sc_cnt_m_month where month_no = '!month_ending!') as month_name_thai , extract(month from sc_lon_m_contract.ending_of_contract) as moth_ending , extract(year from sc_lon_m_contract.ending_of_contract)+543 as year_ending , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_card.last_period , sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance , sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type , sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description , sysdate from sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_contract , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_ucf_prename , sc_lon_m_rule where sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = '25' and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > '0' and sc_lon_m_loan_card.drop_payment_status = '2' and extract(month from sc_lon_m_contract.ending_of_contract) = '!month_ending!' and extract(year from sc_lon_m_contract.ending_of_contract) = '!year_ending!' /*WHERE*/ order by sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
